title: The Legislative Assembly of Nagaland (Change in Representation) Act, 1968
full_text: The Legislative Assembly of Nagaland (Change in Representation) Act, 1968 नागालैंड विधान सभा (प्रतिनिधित्‍व में परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196861 Act Number: 61 Enactment Date: 1968-12-31 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Legislative Assembly of Nagaland (Change in Representation) Act, 1968 Hindi Title: नागालैंड विधान सभा (प्रतिनिधित्‍व में परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1968 Long Title: An Act to provide for a change in representation in the Legislative Assembly of Nagaland and for that purpose to make consequential amendments in the State of Nagaland Act, 1962 and the Representation of the People Act, 1950. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 31-12-1968 Last Updated: 17-12-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Legislative Assembly of Nagaland (Change in Representation) Act, 1968 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Change in representation in the Legislative Assembly of Nagaland. Section 3. [Repealed.]. Section 4. [Repealed.]. Section 5. Saving as to present Legislative Assembly.
